calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint Based On Prior Small Claims Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Olin, Esq., of the Law Offices of Brian Larsen, Tel. 415.398.5000, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN MCGEE'S Motion To Dismiss Complaint Based On Prior Small Claims Judgment is Denied. There is no statutory or evidentiary basis for this motion. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint Based On Prior Small Claims Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Continued To Mar-21-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MEGHAN E. STEVENS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN L. LARSEN, TEL. NO. 398-5000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL R. CHAMBERS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MACMORRIS & CARBNONE, TEL. NO. (510) 267-7276 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOHN MCGEE'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint Based On Prior Small Claims Judgment IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 21, 2012 by agreement of the parties. The opposing party to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. by today. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Continued To May-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion Adnm Otion For Order To Dismiss Pltf'S Complaint Based On Prior Small Claims Judmgent
Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN MCGEE'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT BASED ON PRIOR SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The moving party does not cite any authority permitting a motion to dismiss to be heard one court day prior to the trial, nor is the court aware of any such authority. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
